metadata.title: 99% of people don’t know about this Free AI Repo
metadata.description:
OpenAI and Anthropic both use this. And it's completely open source.

It's a research operating system. Handles AI research end to end.

The same infrastructure frontier labs run. Now free for everyone.

Like getting NASA's mission control. Built for your garage.

Frontier research tools are now open source. Use what OpenAI and Anthropic use. Free.

#opensource #openai #anthropic #airesearch #aitools
